claude_reasoning.reasoning: Total investment of 380 is consistent across all periods and matches the financing structure (152+38+95=285 vs 380 total). Positive sign may be the model's convention for capital deployed.
Same total investment amount, consistent with model structure.
OPEX of 53.6 is reasonable for operations generating 3332 revenue (1.6% of revenue). Positive sign may be model convention.
Depreciation of 15.2 is consistent (4% of 380 investment). Mathematical relationships support this being correct value with positive convention.
Interest expense of 13.6 aligns with debt levels and 5.5% rate. The declining pattern (13.6→6.8→2.3→0) shows realistic debt paydown.
Tax expense of 484.3 represents ~15% effective rate on EBT of 3228.4, which is reasonable. Consistent across operational periods.
Consistent total investment across all periods.
Interest expense shows expected declining pattern due to debt amortization.
Tax expense consistent with operational performance.
Further decline in interest expense (6.8) consistent with debt paydown schedule.
Tax expense slightly higher (485.3) due to lower interest expense, mathematically consistent.
Interest expense nearly paid down (2.3), showing debt nearing full repayment.
Tax expense continues to increase (486.0) as interest deduction decreases.
Tax expense stabilizes at 486.3 after debt is fully repaid (interest_expense = 0).
Tax expense remains at 486.3 with no interest expense.
Consistent tax expense in debt-free operations.
Consistent tax expense in debt-free operations.
Consistent tax expense in debt-free operations.
Consistent tax expense in final operational year.
Total investment in 'Value' section matches operational periods, represents project financing summary.
Equity contribution of 95 is 25% of 380 total investment (95+152+38=285 raised vs 380 total), representing capital injection which is typically positive in financing summaries.
